items.title: Integration Health Check & Repair
items.description: Audited all v5.x modules; all 26 exports confirmed in core/index.ts; all route registrations confirmed in v5/index.ts; resilience module added and exported.

items.title: Cross-Module Integration Tests
items.description: Created tests/v5/integration-cross-module.test.ts with 38 tests covering BudgetEnforcer+ModelSelector, SprintPlanner→Runner→Evaluator, WorkflowRunner concurrency, GitBranchManager+MergeQueue, ExecutionLog, KnowledgeGraph, CanaryManager, FederationManager.

items.title: Resilience: Circuit Breakers on External Calls
items.description: Created packages/core/src/resilience/ with RetryPolicy (exponential backoff + jitter), TimeoutWrapper (AbortController + Promise.race), HealthMonitor (rolling window failure rate + auto circuit open). Added GET /api/v5/health/services route. Exported from core/index.ts.

items.title: Dashboard: System Health Page
items.description: Created packages/dashboard/src/routes/health/+page.svelte with overall status banner, per-service health cards with success rate bars, auto-refresh every 10s. Added Health link to sidebar nav.

items.title: Version Banner in Dashboard
items.description: Updated packages/dashboard/src/routes/+page.svelte homepage with version badge (agentforge v5.9.0), sprint progress tracker, and test count badge.

items.title: v5.9 Sprint Record + Bump to 5.9.0
items.description: Bumped versions in package.json, plugin.json, server routes (5.8.0→5.9.0). Written sprint JSON. Final test count: 3309 passing.
